description: Abstract Base Classes. Provides infrastructure for defining abstract base classes (ABCs) that enforce method implementation in subclasses.

functions.name: abstractmethod

params.name: funcobj
params.description: The function to mark as abstract

functions.description: Decorator indicating an abstract method. A class that has a metaclass of ABCMeta cannot be instantiated unless all of its abstract methods are overridden. Unlike Java abstract methods, these can have an implementation callable via super().

classes.name: ABCMeta
classes.description: Metaclass for defining Abstract Base Classes (ABCs). A class created with ABCMeta as its metaclass cannot be instantiated if it has any abstract methods that have not been overridden. Use as: __metaclass__ = ABCMeta (Python 2.7 syntax).

params.name: namespace
params.description: Dictionary of class attributes and methods

constructors.description: Create a new abstract base class. Normally used by setting __metaclass__ = ABCMeta in the class body rather than calling directly.

methods.name: register

params.name: subclass
params.description: The class to register as a virtual subclass of this ABC

methods.description: Register subclass as a virtual subclass of this ABC. isinstance() and issubclass() will return True for the registered class, even though it does not inherit from the ABC. The registered class is not required to implement abstract methods.

methods.name: __instancecheck__

returns.description: True if instance is an instance of this ABC or a registered/actual subclass

methods.description: Override for isinstance(). Checks if the given object is an instance of this ABC, including virtual subclasses registered via register().

methods.name: __subclasscheck__

returns.description: True if subclass is a subclass of this ABC or was registered

methods.description: Override for issubclass(). Checks if the given class is a subclass of this ABC, including virtual subclasses registered via register().

classes.name: abstractproperty
classes.description: A subclass of the built-in property(), indicating an abstract property. A class with ABCMeta metaclass cannot be instantiated unless all abstract properties are overridden. Deprecated in Python 3; use @property with @abstractmethod instead.

params.name: fget
params.description: Function for getting the attribute value

params.name: fset
params.description: Function for setting the attribute value

constructors.description: Create an abstract property. Can also be used as a decorator: @abstractproperty.
